name: Peach Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Half & Half or Coffee Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the peaches and cut them in half, removing the stones. Arrange the halves with the cut side down in an unbaked pie shell.
2. Mix together the sugar, flour, and cinnamon with the cream to form a paste.
3. Pour the mixture over the peaches.
4. Place the pie in a hot oven preheated to 450°F (230°C) and bake for 10 minutes or until the pastry begins to brown.
5. Reduce the temperature of the oven to moderate heat, around 350°F (175°C), and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes or until the peaches are tender.
6. Remove from the oven and allow it to cool before serving.
